svg.title: Benchmark overview for the option pricing library
svg.desc: Reviewer-facing benchmark summary showing IV scaling, PDE cost versus accuracy, macro pipeline stage budget, and concise measured callouts for digital remedies, local-vol extraction, and tree scaling.

text.font-family: DejaVu Sans, Liberation Sans, Arial, sans-serif
